description:
'''Corridos tumbados''' ({{IPA|es|koˈriðos tumˈbaðos}}), also known as '''trap corridos''', is a [[subgenre]] of [[regional Mexican]] music, specifically of a [[corrido]], with musical elements of a [[narcocorrido]] and [[rap music]]. Its style originated in the late 2010s; later popularized by Mexican musician [[Natanael Cano]]. 

The subgenre later received international recognition through songs released by Mexican musician [[Peso Pluma]], as well as other artists such as [[Junior H]] and [[Fuerza Regida]].
